prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年物理类最低位次约6096→8188→10035→12252名，呈持续后移趋势，4年累计后移约6156名，年均后移约1500名；2025年基准约12252名；本省物理类计划2022年23人、2023年22人、2024年24人、2025年26人，2026年扩招至33人，较2025年增加7人（+26.9%），扩招幅度较大，竞争压力有所减弱。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第57名，近年排名稳定在47–57区间，属于财经类顶尖院校；近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆 情或投档异常事件；抖音热度排名第91位（一般），短视频平台关注度中等偏低；应用经济学A、工商管理A、外国语言文学A-，三大A类学科覆盖金融学类、工 商管理类等核心招生专业；数据科学、金融工程等新工科专业受益于学校财经背景。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合物理类近年位次持续后移趋势、2026年扩招（+26. 9%）、物理类考生略有增加、学校声誉平稳、热门工科专业热度高等因素，扩招与考生增加部分对冲，持续后移趋势最为关键；预测最低位次约14281名，区间13781–14781名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 6096 → 8188 → 10035 → 12252, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative shift of about 6156 positions over 4 years, averaging about 1500 positions per year; the 2025 baseline is about 12252; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 23 in 2022, 22 in 2023, 24 in 2024, 26 in 2025, and expands to 33 in 2026, an increase of 7 (+26.9%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, reducing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, with recent rankings stable in the 47–57 range, belonging to the top-tier finance and economics institutions; recent reputation is stable, with no significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission incidents; Douyin popularity ranking 91st (average), with moderate to low attention on short video platforms; Applied Economics A, Business Administration A, Foreign Language and Literature A-, three A-class disciplines covering core enrollment majors such as Finance, Business Administration; new engineering majors like Data Science and Financial Engineering benefit from the school's finance and economics background.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended with high social heat, Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended, and UIBE's Data Science, Financial Engineering, Actuarial Science benefit from overall engineering heat; the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Hubei in 2026 is about 252,000, a slight increase from 249,800 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; the school is located in Beijing, which has strong appeal to Hubei examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of Physics Category rankings in recent years, the 2026 enrollment expansion (+26.9%), a slight increase in Physics Category examinees, stable school reputation, and high heat of popular engineering majors, the expansion and increase in examinees partially offset each other, with the continuous backward trend being the most critical factor; the predicted minimum ranking is about 14281, with a range of 13781–14781.

- Data Science.

- Economics (International Economics and Trade, Public Finance, Taxation).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the continuous backward trend for Physics Category is evident, with a predicted ranking range of 13781–14781. Candidates at the lower end of the range (around 13781) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors like Financial Engineering, Actuarial Science, and Data Science; those in the middle of the range (around 14281) should mainly target Tier 2 majors such as Data Science category, Finance, and Accounting joint degree; those at the upper end of the range (around 14781) are advised to use Tier 3 majors like Financial Mathematics, Digital Economy, and Law as safety options.
